ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment type (e.g., chemical, biological) */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Complexity level of the experiment type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., temperature, pressure, flow rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., Celsius, bar, ml/min) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the condition */,
  "measurement_device" TEXT /* Device used to measure the condition */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time at which the condition was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., temperature, pressure, flow rate) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., Celsius, bar, ml/min) */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "range" TEXT /* Acceptable range for the parameter */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the parameter */,
  "measurement_device" TEXT /* Device used to measure the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time at which the data point was collected */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the data point */,
  "measurement_device" TEXT /* Device used to measure the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data in the file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier searching and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier searching and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level required for access (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions_data" (
  "version_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version data point */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the data point belongs to */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_data_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaborator's role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., statistical, qualitative) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., interim, final) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
